user_query: Please provide me with the history of the last 30 spins in the Lightning Roulette game. I want to know the numbers and colors of the winning outcomes. Additionally, I'm looking for a funny and ironic sentence to use in my upcoming presentation.

TaskList.description: Query the history of the last 30 spins in the Lightning Roulette game to get winning numbers and colors.
Generate a funny and ironic sentence suitable for a presentation.
